meaning: Having twelve sons and thirteen grandsons already filling the house, yet the old man's wandering mind is still obsessing over young women. (A humorous jab at an elderly person who refuses to act their age and harbors inappropriate, youthful desires instead of focusing on their senior responsibilities).
Even a river turns back in twelve years.
A young celibate, winks when he sees a woman.
Squeezing sand does not produce oil.

text: बाहिर बाहिर लोकाचार भित्र भित्र पोका पार
meaning: Outwardly custom, inwardly separate.

The mood or patience of an orthodox priest is as fragile and minuscule as the gallbladder (पित्त) of a tiny housefly. (Someone who is incredibly touchy, overly sensitive, and gets instantly offended or triggered over petty, minor details).
A Brahmin's topknot is neither aerial nor antenna.

An entire span of a priest's measured land gets bartered away for the cheap price of a single male goat. (Desperately selling off highly valuable, permanent assets for a fraction of their worth during a chaotic emergency or due to poor business skills).

text: बाहुनको सेखी झरे नेवारले भाँडाको धोती लगाउँछ
meaning: If a proud Brahmin completely loses his high social status and pride, a Newar potter might as well start wearing a storage vessel as a loincloth. (A historical, sarcastic remark about a total, chaotic collapse of traditional social hierarchies and customs where everything turns upside down).

Gifting sweet sugar piled on top of already sweet molasses (खुदो) to a pampered priest. (Overindulging or showering excessive, redundant gifts and privileges onto someone who is already wealthy and heavily favored by the system).

text: बाहुनले च्याउ खाओस् न स्वाद पाओस्
meaning: A conservative priest who textually forbade mushrooms will neither bring himself to eat them nor ever understand their rich flavor. (An overly rigid, close-minded person missing out on great opportunities or modern innovations purely because of their stubborn, outdated prejudices).

text: बाह्र बर्ष बाइबल पढायो, भूकम्प आउँदा राम राम
meaning: Taught the Bible for twelve years, when the earthquake came, 'Ram Ram'.

text: बाह्र बर्ष रामायण पढायो, सीता कस्की जोई
meaning: Taught the Ramayana for twelve years, whose wife is Sita?

text: बाह्र बर्षमा पोइ आयो, मै रोइलीलाई ज्वरो आयो
meaning: The husband came after twelve years, and I, Roili, got a fever.
Education is the real wealth.

Hanging a garland of dried tiny fish (सिद्रा) around the neck of a predatory house cat. (Placing an absolute, irresistible temptation directly in front of someone who is hardwired to consume it; an incredibly foolish security arrangement).

text: बिहे गर्ने अलमलमा केटी खोज्न बिर्सियो
meaning: In the hurry to get married, forgot to look for a girl.

Leaving a precious stash of dried tiny fish as a trusted deposit (नासो) in the custody of a hungry cat. (A variation of ID 533; handing over valuable funds or vulnerable assets to a known corrupt official or thief and expecting them to guard it safely).

To a person of refined understanding, it is precious, fragrant sandalwood (श्रीखण्ड); to an ignorant fool, it is treated as nothing more than a cheap wooden handle for a weeding knife (खुर्पी). (A sophisticated idea, high art, or premium asset is completely wasted on an uncultured person who has zero capacity to appreciate its true value).

Right in the sacred vicinity of Budhanilkantha (Nayanthan), co-wives are violently brawling with each other. (A chaotic, unholy, and embarrassing domestic conflict breaking out in a place that demands supreme peace, dignity, and respect).

text: बुढी मरी भनेर होइन, काल पल्क्यो भनेर डराउनु पर्छ
meaning: The true terror isn't simply that one old woman passed away, but that death (काल) has now found the path to our doorstep and formed a habit of visiting. (Do not ignore a minor initial loss or a small cyber-breach; the real danger is that a dangerous precedent has been set, and enemies now know exactly how to exploit your weakness repeatedly).
In old age, living at the rest house.

text: बुढो पोइले हसाउँछ, ठिटो पोइले रुवाउँछ
meaning: An old husband makes you laugh, a young husband makes you cry.

text: बुहारीको गाला हेरी गाउँले अघाए, नाति केटो भोकै
meaning: The villagers stuffed themselves full just by staring at the beautiful daughter-in-law's face, while the actual little grandson was left starved in the corner. (A family or business spending all its resources putting on an expensive, glamorous external show for outsiders while completely neglecting the core needs of its own internal members).
When the old man dies, the promises shift.
The old woman died, and now death has learned the way to our house. (A shorter conversational version of ID 538; a warning that an initial misfortune paves the way for recurring troubles).

text: बेलामा छोराछोरीलाई नसारेपछि आफ्नो छाती पिट्नुपर्छ
meaning: If you fail to guide, discipline, or correct your children at the appropriate time, you will inevitably end up beating your own chest in deep regret later in life. (Neglecting critical early course-corrections in parenting or project management guarantees a massive disaster down the road).

text: बैंक लुट्नेलाई भन्दा समाउन जाने पुलिसलाई लाज
meaning: More shame on the police who go to catch than on the bank robber.

Amidst absolute chaos, domestic rioting, and a collapsing household (भाडभैलो), the young brother-in-law is busy acting carefree and putting on youthful airs. (A completely irresponsible, detached person focusing on personal vanity and having fun while their organization or family is actively burning down around them).
The virtuous one was killed by virtue.

The moment your bitter enemy smiles with satisfaction, it means a devastating landslide (पहिरो) of trouble is already shifting under your feet. (Never celebrate an enemy's sudden politeness or happiness; it usually means their hidden plot to ruin you is succeeding).

Shoving a massive, giant ash gourd (कुभिन्डो) directly into the tiny mouth of a male goat. (Overloading a low-capacity employee or a small system with an overwhelmingly massive task that they cannot physically digest or handle).

text: बोकाले दाइँ हुने भए गोरु किन चाहिन्थ्यो
meaning: If tiny male goats were capable of performing the heavy threshing of grain (दाइँ), why on earth would farmers ever go through the immense expense of maintaining powerful oxen? (Low-skilled, cheap labor or basic software tools can never replace high-grade professionals and heavy enterprise infrastructure when it comes to massive, high-volume operations).

text: बोकाले रोपाइँ हुने भए गोरु किन चाहियो
meaning: If goats could successfully plow mud fields for rice transplanting (रोपाइँ), oxen would be completely redundant. (A common conversational variation of ID 550; emphasizing that heavy-duty tasks require heavy-duty tools).
Speak, speak, fish, with your mouth full of water.
Once words and bullets are released, they don't come back.

text: बोलेर बाठो र दौडेर छिटो कहिल्यै हुँदैन
meaning: Being clever by talking and being fast by running never happens.

text: बोल्नेको पिठो बिक्छ, नबोल्नेको चामल पनि बिक्दैन
meaning: The flour of the talker sells, the rice of the non-talker does not.

text: व्रत बस्ने हामी, फलाहार खाने कामी
meaning: We are the ones enduring the painful religious fast, yet the iron-smith helper (कामी) is the one walking away eating all the premium ritual fruits (फलाहार). (A frustrating situation where one team does all the rigorous, exhausting work, while a detached bystander or a clever contractor swoops in and enjoys all the sweet perks and profits).

Killing a tiny sparrow (भँगेरो) with a slingshot is incredibly easy, but spending hours plucking its microscopic feathers (भुत्ल्याउन) is an exhausting nightmare. (An action or business deal that seems quick and effortless to initiate, but sorting out its endless micro-level complications and paperwork turns out to be a massive headache).
If there is, it's fine; if not, the old man's funeral.

The Bhandari manager casually pointed his finger or leaked the gossip, and the hot-headed Gotame stepped up and mercilessly thrashed the target. (How instigators or corporate manipulators safely stay in the background while tricking a gullible person into doing their dirty work and taking the blame).
When you have to say something, say it after bringing it to the wall.

text: भन्नेलाई के छ र, चिनेर आउँदा खाना छ
meaning: What does the speaker have? When you come after recognizing, there is food.

text: भरोसा राखे घर बन्छ, नराखे डेरा पनि बन्दैन
meaning: With trust, a house is built; without trust, even a rented place is not built.

text: भाँडा चलाउने सुनार, आगो चलाउने लोहार
meaning: The goldsmith handles the pot, the blacksmith handles the fire.

text: भाँडो सुनको के काम, भनाइ मुटु फुटाउने
meaning: What is the point of owning luxury kitchen vessels crafted from pure gold if your daily words are toxic enough to shatter someone's heart? (Material wealth and luxury assets are completely worthless if a person possesses a cruel, abusive personality).

text: भाग्यले पाइन्छ छोरो, धनले पाइन्छ जोई
meaning: A son is obtained by fate, a daughter-in-law by wealth.

text: भाग्यले पाउँदा खै के छ, नपाउँदा के छैन
meaning: What does one have when fate gives? What does one not have when fate doesn't?

Packing the kitchen head chef (भान्से) and a sharp sickle (आँसी) into the exact same carrying basket. (A highly dangerous, volatile combination of conflicting elements or people kept in close quarters that will inevitably lead to an accident).
The bear earns, the jackal eats.
Disease inside, gold medicine outside.

Surviving in life purely by acting as an obedient priest to a terrifying malevolent ghost. (Earning a living by constantly placating, serving, and kissing up to a highly toxic, abusive, or corrupt boss out of sheer survival necessity).

text: भुइँ चुलोको राजा, आफू लुकेर खाजा
meaning: The king of the ground stove, hiding and eating snacks.

text: भुइँ लगाउन सजिलो, भुइँ माथि उठाउन गाह्रो
meaning: Easy to level to the ground, hard to lift above ground.

Deliberately stepping onto a pile of red-hot burning embers (भुङ्ग्रो) with your own bare feet. (Stupidity or self-sabotage; knowingly walking directly into a dangerous trap, legal disaster, or financial ruin out of sheer stubbornness).

When it's time to add cooking oil or fat (भुटुन), they go completely missing; but when it's time to sit down and overeat cooked delicacies, they are first in line. (A lazy leech who sneaks away when it's time to invest capital or do hard labor, but aggressively shows up to consume the final profits).

text: भूल त कस्तूरीको मृगलाई पनि लाग्छ
meaning: Even the musk deer makes mistakes.

text: भेडाको ऊन पनि उत्तिकै, सबै उत्तिकै
meaning: Sheep's wool is all the same, everything is the same.

text: भोकै बस्नु भन्दा बोकेर खानु बेस
meaning: Better to carry and eat than to stay hungry.

text: भोकै बसेको भोकै मर्छ, बोलेको बोलेइ मर्छ
meaning: The hungry dies hungry, the speaker dies speaking.

text: भोकै सुतेको भोकै उठ्छ, भन्न नजानेको भन्नै जान्दैन
meaning: He who sleeps hungry wakes hungry; he who doesn't know how to speak never learns.

text: भोटले पार्यो भोट, राणाले पार्यो राणा
meaning: Tibetans made Tibet, Ranas made Rana.

text: भोटेलाई पिँडालु र बोकेलाई बासी भात
meaning: Feeding wild taro roots to a mountain trader or serving stale rice to a goat-herder/carrier—they will happily accept it as a feast. (An item that looks cheap and ordinary to an elite person might be highly valued and appreciated by someone who genuinely needs it).

text: भोट भन्नु र गोरुलाई सिङ भन्नु एउटै
meaning: Uttering the word 'Tibet' (high mountains) is just as natural and obvious as pointing out that an ox possesses a pair of sharp horns. (Stating a completely obvious, undeniable, and universally known fact that requires absolutely no complex proof).

text: भोलि भनेको छैन विश्वास, मानिसको के आश्वास
meaning: Tomorrow is not trustworthy, what assurance for a person?
What is the use of Singhadurbar for not committing corruption?

The shallow, dramatic swooshing sound (स्वाइँ) of showing off is far louder than the actual substance or ground reality (भ्वाइँ). (An empty vessel putting on a highly dramatic, pretentious performance to hide their complete lack of actual wealth, talent, or authority).

text: मकैको रोटीमा घिउ हाल्न र माइतको सम्पतिमा जित हाल्न बेकार छ
meaning: Putting ghee on corn bread and claiming victory over parental property is useless.

text: मन नपर्ने जेठी बुहारीले पकाएको खिर पनि गनाउँछ, मन पर्ने कान्छी बुहारीको पाद पनि बसाउँछ
meaning: Even rice pudding made by the disliked eldest daughter-in-law stinks; even the fart of the liked youngest daughter-in-law stays fragrant.
The liked boy is the elder brother-in-law.
A liked flower is juicy even after drying.

text: मन पर्ने मान्छेको दुर्गन्ध नै सुगन्ध
meaning: For a liked person, even bad smell is fragrance.
Eat the heart's laddu with ghee.
Cold enters the mind.

text: मन्त्री हुनु कहिले कहिले, कमिसन थाप्नु पहिले
meaning: Becoming a minister is occasional, taking commission comes first.

text: मरी जाने चोला, उडी जाने सास
meaning: The body dies, the breath flies away.
There is nothing to take by dying.
Plucking the whiskers of a dead tiger.

text: मरेको बिरालो काखी च्यापेर ठिमीको उकालो
meaning: Tucking a rotting, foul-smelling dead cat firmly under one's arm (काखी च्यापेर) while exhausting oneself climbing up the steep hill of Thimi. (Stubbornly dragging along a completely dead project, a failed business strategy, or a highly toxic liability that smells terrible to the public, purely out of blind pride).
After death, even a Dumai is a king.

text: मर्दको एउटै कुरा, नामर्दको दश थरी
meaning: A true man of honor stands firmly by a single, solid word, whereas a coward or untrustworthy person changes his tune into ten different stories. (Integrity vs. deceit; a reliable person keeps their promises, while a fraud constantly changes their excuses).
Even fire backs away from a man's moustache.

Stretching out one's limbs (लाम तन्काउनु) or yawning excessively right before death takes over. (Making futile, dramatic, or desperate final movements/adjustments when a total collapse, business bankruptcy, or defeat is already completely inevitable).
Better to go mad than to die.

Craving a piece of fresh, green bamboo split (काँझो) or an impossible, unusual taste right on one's deathbed. (Developing a sudden, absurd desire for luxurious assets, new projects, or erratic pleasures at the absolute end of a career or lifetime when it no longer matters).

If one is absolutely destined to go down or die, they will intentionally kick and drag others down by their legs along with them. (A toxic, vindictive action where a failing employee or bankrupt business owner maliciously tries to ruin their partners or competitors on their way out).

text: मलाई खाने बाघले तँलाई पनि खान सक्छ
meaning: The tiger that eats me can eat you too.

text: महाकालीले हानेका जनता बिजुली चम्किँदा तर्सिन्छन्
meaning: People who have been severely traumatized by the roaring floods of the Mahakali River will panic and tremble even at a simple flash of lightning. (A variation of 'once bitten, twice shy'; a person or economy that has faced a massive financial disaster will panic at the slightest sign of market volatility).
A spider's web is a fly's doom.

text: मागेको गोरु, चोरेको हलो; बाँच्नु भन्दा मरेकै भलो
meaning: Trying to run a farm using a begged ox and a stolen plow; it is more honorable to die than to live in such dependency and shame. (Relying entirely on borrowed capital, rented software, and stolen ideas to run a business, which ultimately strips away all your self-respect and operational control).
A beggar does not have the right to choose.

A beggar's entire net worth can be accurately calculated just by counting their collection of disposable leaf plates (टपरी). (A sarcastic remark about small-time talkers who brag about wealth, when their actual assets consist of low-value, temporary items).
Hot rice for a beggar.

text: माछा देखे दुला भित्र हात, सर्प देखे दुला बाहिर हात
meaning: Shoving your hand deep inside a dark hole the moment you spot a delicious fish, but instantly yanking it back out if a venomous snake appears. (An ultimate opportunist who aggressively runs forward to claim easy profits, but completely deserts the team and flees the moment risks or liabilities arise).
A fish's strength is only in water.

Chasing after what clearly looked like a prize fish, only to lift the net and find a useless, ordinary frog. (Experiencing immense disappointment after investing heavy time and effort into a lead or project that promised high returns but turned out to be completely worthless).
Fish as a gift in a fisherman's house.

text: माझीको मतो गर्दा सात गाउँ डुब्यो
meaning: While the indecisive ferrymen (माझी) were busy arguing and holding endless meetings, seven entire coastal villages were completely submerged by the floodwaters. (A severe warning against 'analysis paralysis'; a business or government failing to take prompt action during an emergency because leaders are stuck in endless committee debates).

text: माझीले सल्लाह गर्दागर्दै सात गाउँ डुब्यो
meaning: While the boatmen kept debating their strategic options, seven villages drowned. (A direct conversational variation of ID 616; highlighting how bureaucratic delays cause absolute ruin during time-sensitive crises).

Smashing a fragile clay pot using a heavy wooden mallet (मुङ्ग्रो). (Applying completely disproportionate force or using an aggressively heavy-handed approach to solve a very minor, delicate problem).
Plant one mana and reap a muri.

text: मान्छे खेदाउनु अगाडिबाट, वस्तु खेदाउनु पछाडिबाट
meaning: To guide or corner a person, you must confront them from the front; to herd livestock (वस्तु), you must drive them from behind. (A management lesson; human beings require direct, face-to-face communication and clear leadership, whereas inanimate tasks or livestock simply need to be pushed from the rear).

text: मान्छेमा ईख, सर्पमा विष नभए कसैले गन्दैन
meaning: If a human lacks fierce determination/pride (ईख) and a snake lacks venom, absolutely no one will respect or fear them. (Without core strength, a competitive drive, or the power to enforce consequences, a person or business will be walked all over by everyone in the market).

Boasting about your glorious family lineage and ancestors directly in front of your own maternal uncle (मामा). (Silly and redundant bragging; trying to show off your background to someone who already knows your entire history inside and out).

text: मामा आउँदा केरा पाकेन, केरा पाक्दा मामा आएनन्
meaning: When the uncle came, bananas weren't ripe; when bananas ripened, the uncle didn't come.
On the uncle's horse, the nephew's 'hey hey'.
Killing is sin, keeping is virtue.

Chanting the holy name of Ram with your mouth while keeping a sharp dagger hidden away in your pocket (बगली). (Extreme hypocrisy and deceit; someone who acts incredibly polite, sweet, and supportive to your face while actively plotting your corporate sabotage or personal ruin).

text: मुखमा लगाउन चिलाउनेको गेडो छैन, मलद्वारमा लगाउन जाइफल
meaning: Not owning even a cheap wild seed (चिलाउनेको गेडो) to treat one's face, yet hunting for premium, expensive nutmeg (जाइफल) to apply as a remedy to one's rear end. (Having completely backward priorities; spending heavily on superficial luxuries or low-priority areas while failing to fund basic, essential survival needs).

text: मुखमा सरस्वती हुनेको सधैँ बृहस्पति आउँछ
meaning: One whose speech is blessed with truth, wisdom, and grace (Saraswati) will naturally attract supreme intelligence, wealth, and good fortune (Brahस्पति/Jupiter). (Excellent communication skills, honesty, and diplomacy naturally pave the way for massive professional success).

The fleeting, deceptive warmth obtained by urinating inside one's own clothing during a freezing winter night. (An incredibly short-sighted, desperate fix or temporary solution—like taking high-interest short-term loans—that offers instant comfort but makes your actual crisis significantly worse very quickly).
A fool and money are soon finished.
A fool's wealth does not last.

Stubbornly insisting that my specific ox is worth exactly twelve Takka coins, completely ignoring the expert market valuation. (An incredibly stubborn, close-minded person who refuses to accept objective data, logic, or market feedback because they are obsessed with being right).
The fruit of hard work is sweet.

Coming over to beg for buttermilk (मोही) while actively trying to hide the wooden container (ढुङ्ग्रो) behind your back. (Being deeply hesitant, embarrassed, or indirect about what you actually want; trying to negotiate a business deal or ask for help without being transparent about your true intentions).

text: मौका आउँछ पर्खिँदैन, बगेको खोला फर्किँदैन
meaning: Opportunity comes but doesn't wait; a flown river doesn't return.
You must know how to hit a four when the opportunity comes.

When an absolute crisis hits or a vital opportunity arises, you must be humble enough to massage even a leper's feet if they hold the key to your survival. (Sallowing your pride, ego, and personal biases to flatter or cooperate with someone you dislike because they hold absolute leverage over your project).
You must be able to break even a diamond when the opportunity arises.
Neither here nor there, a shoe in the hand.

text: युद्धको बेलामा बुद्धको पुराण काम लाग्दैन
meaning: In times of war, Buddha's Purana is of no use.

text: राजाको अगाडि र घोडाको पछाडि नलाग्नु, लात खाइन्छ
meaning: Don't stand before a king or behind a horse; you'll get kicked.
The king's work is notorious everywhere.

Abandoning a prestigious, high-status assignment for the King just to go sing Deusi festival songs at a local blacksmith's doorstep. (Leaving a highly lucrative, stable career or essential core project to chase after petty, minor distractions and low-value activities).
Shortage of salt in the king's house.

text: राजाको धन जान्छ, भण्डारेको पेट पोल्छ
meaning: The wealthy King is losing his gold, yet it is the lowly storekeeper (भण्डारे) whose stomach burns with anxiety. (An unnecessary display of stress by a middle-manager or third party over financial losses that belong entirely to the billionaire owner who doesn't even care).

text: कुकुरको पुच्छर बाह्र वर्ष ढुङ्ग्रोमा राखे पनि बाङ्गाको बाङ्गै
meaning: Even if you keep a dog's crooked tail trapped inside a straight wooden pipe (ढुङ्ग्रो) for twelve long years, it will instantly curl right back to its original shape the moment it is released. (A deeply corrupt person, a bad habit, or poorly written unoptimized legacy code that can never be permanently corrected, no matter how much training or restructuring you attempt).

A loose, fiercely independent woman who lives by her own rules has absolutely no actual need or respect for a permanent husband. (A self-sufficient, aggressive operator who refuses to adhere to traditional partnerships or corporate oversight because they prefer absolute freedom).
Night or queen.

As the deep dark night finally rolls away, a fresh, clear dawn begins to emerge. (A comforting reminder that absolute despair, severe financial crises, and hard times are temporary and will eventually give way to new opportunities and growth).

Chanting religious prayers at the top of your lungs all night long, only to find out in the morning that your ritual fee (दक्षिणा) was lost or forgotten. (Performing intense, exhausting labor or working overtime on a major tech project, only to receive zero compensation, recognition, or payout due to an error).

text: रात राम्रो जुनले, मान्छे राम्रो गुनले
meaning: Night is good for the moon, a person is good for qualities.

Spending the entire night bitterly cursing the wealthy moneylender, yet he wakes up perfectly healthy and alive in the morning. (Venting useless, passive-aggressive anger and whining about market monopolies or rich corporate bosses achieves absolutely nothing; it doesn't alter reality).

text: रातभरी रामायण पढायो, सीता कस्की जोइ
meaning: Taught Ramayana all night, whose wife is Sita?
Old woman crying all night is still alive.

text: राम राम भन्यो, जोई पर्यो पोइ
meaning: Chanting the name of God for a peaceful life, but ending up trapped with a completely incompatible, chaotic spouse. (Hoping for a smooth, easy business venture but getting stuck with an absolute nightmare of a partner or a messy legal contract).
With Ravan's death, Lanka does not become empty.

text: रिस खा आफू, बुद्धि खा अरू
meaning: Swallow and consume your own anger internally, but use your sharp intellect to outsmart and handle others. (A supreme lesson in emotional intelligence; letting anger explode destroys your own assets, whereas remaining calm lets you outmaneuver opponents strategically).
Who reads the Vedas in a fit of anger?

Never place your full trust in a smooth-talking person who completely lacks a visible Adam's apple (रुद्रघण्टी). (A traditional, symbolic warning to be highly cautious around slick, overly polished, or deceptive charlatans who hide their true identity and intentions).
Kajal does not stop crying eyes.

text: रोटी चिल्लो मिठो, कुरा खस्रो मिठो
meaning: Bread is smooth and sweet, words are rough and sweet.

text: लक्का जवान छोरोलाई के को धक्का
meaning: A strong, energetic, and highly capable young man (लक्का जवान) can easily withstand any sudden physical blow, financial shock, or setback. (A highly resilient, heavily funded startup or a skilled professional can easily absorb temporary market losses and bounce back stronger).

Getting a sudden, uncontrollable urge to defecate at the exact, highly critical second of an auspicious wedding ritual (लगन). (Experiencing a ridiculous, self-inflicted distraction or system crash at the absolute peak moment of a major product launch or client presentation).

What on earth is the use of bringing the sacred glass-bead wedding necklace (पोते) after the entire marriage ceremony is already finished? (An action or delivery that is completely useless because it arrived too late; submitting a feature or a financial bid after the strict deadline has already passed).

Tearing up your basic, essential loincloth (लङ्गाटी) just to proudly wave a decorative, embroidered floral handkerchief (कुसुमे रुमाल). (Compromising your core infrastructure, basic living savings, or backend security just to show off a flashy, superficial frontend feature to the public).

text: लङ्का जित्ने हनुमान, जस पाउने ढेडु
meaning: It was the mighty warrior Hanuman who fought the brutal battles and burned down Lanka, yet it is the lazy, ordinary langur monkeys (ढेडु) back home who take all the credit and praise. (A common corporate tragedy where a brilliant junior developer does 100% of the hard coding, but the lazy manager takes all the bonuses and spotlight).

When you pull tightly on a single hanging forest vine (लहरा), the entire massive rocky cliffside (पहरा) begins to shake and rumble. (A warning about interconnected risks; touching or auditing one minor aspect of a corrupt system or code library can trigger a massive avalanche of hidden problems and powerful legal consequences).
Pulling a small vine causes the entire mountain cliff to vibrate. (The standard linguistic variation of ID 667; a reminder that minor actions can trigger massive, systemic chain reactions).

In a land populated entirely by unkempt, simple-minded fools (लटा), a man who merely possesses a visible throat goiter (गाँडा) is praised as an elite, handsome youth. (In a highly low-skilled market or an uneducated community, even a person with mediocre talent or flawed knowledge easily passes off as an absolute genius).
In a land of lazy people, the butt is young.

text: लाटो लड्छ एक बल्ड्याङ, बाठो लड्छ तीन बल्ड्याङ
meaning: A simple-minded person slips and falls down just once, but an overly clever, arrogant smart-alec trips and flips over three times in a spectacular crash. (An ordinary person makes simple mistakes, but an overconfident 'expert' who tries to cheat the system ends up facing a massive, multi-layered financial or legal disaster).

A stubborn horse that responds only to heavy whips and kicks will never listen to soft, polite words. (A highly undisciplined or rogue actor who will never fix their behavior through polite warnings; they require strict legal action or immediate penalties).

A stubborn ghost that responds only to physical blows will never listen to polite conversation. (The classic conversational version of ID 672; emphasizing that hardened criminals, trolls, or toxic contractors only understand tough, enforceable consequences).

The ultimate taker (Death or an investor) hasn't even finalized the decision to acquire, yet the anxious person is already packed up and rushing out the door. (Panicking prematurely or making frantic preparations for a business exit or transition before the formal terms have even been proposed).
The giver is in more hurry than the taker.

text: लैलैमा लाग्नेको पत्तै छैन, खस्ने कामिको खसखस
meaning: The person directly involved or affected remains entirely calm and unbothered, while an irrelevant, meddling bystander is burning up with frantic anxiety. (A third-party contractor or nosy relative stressing out over a business negotiation far more than the actual owners who are completely relaxed).

A solid, legally binding written contract (लिखितम) completely obliterates any verbal promises or spoken explanations (बकतम्). (A vital business rule; never rely on casual spoken assurances. Always get every agreement, feature specification, and payment terms down in a formal written contract).

Using completely looted, stolen wealth to fund a lavish, generous holy ritual for one's paternal aunt (फुपू). (Generously spending illegally acquired funds, corporate bribes, or venture capital money on high-end perks and public charities because it didn't cost you any hard personal labor).

text: ले ले बाबु गुलेली, मारिदिउँला जुरेली
meaning: Handing a child a toy slingshot (गुलेली) and sweet-talking them by promising to go hunt a red-whiskered bulbul bird (जुरेली). (Placating, distracting, or pacifying an angry client or child with cheap, temporary toys and unrealistic promises just to keep them quiet for a moment).
A husband-wife quarrel is like a straw fire.
Greed leads to gain, gain leads to lament.

The hoarded wealth of a miserable, tight-fisted miser (लोभी) is destined to be swept away and consumed by a clever, smooth-talking scammer (चठु/छट्टु). (When a business owner hoards cash and refuses to pay fair market rates for real talent, they inevitably get conned by a smooth-talking fraudster promising cheap miracles).
As long as the greedy live, the sinful do not die hungry.

text: लौरो टेके भर हुन्छ, कान्छी ल्याए घर हुन्छ
meaning: Leaning on a walking stick provides physical support, and marrying a young second wife supposedly completes a household. (A traditional, ironical old saying about old men seeking comfort or attempting to secure their domestic future through risky choices).

text: ल्हासामा सुन छ, कान मेरो बुच्चै
meaning: There may be massive mountains of pure gold sitting over in Lhasa, Tibet, but my own ears remain completely bare and empty. (A frustrating disconnect; hearing massive news about global economic booms, high-paying tech fields, or billionaire profits that mean absolutely nothing to your current personal bank account).

text: वचन फेर्नु र बाबु फेर्नु उस्तै हो
meaning: Going back on your solemn, given word is just as dishonorable and shameful as trying to change your own biological father. (An extreme cultural statement emphasizing that a person of true integrity must stand firmly by their promises, contracts, and business commitments no matter what).

text: वल्लो घरको नरे, पल्लो घरमा सरे
meaning: Nare, the ordinary worker from this house, simply packed up and shifted over to the neighbor's house. (A completely status-quo change; a lateral career move or software migration that offers absolutely zero actual progress, upgrades, or noticeable difference in quality).
Neither this riverbank nor the other shore.

In a goldsmith's or craftsman's house (बाँडा), every single member acts like an elite priest. (A chaotic scenario where every single employee in a tech team tries to act like the head system architect or boss, leading to a total lack of execution).
A pit on this side, a cliff on the other side.
At the time of destruction, the mind works backwards.

text: विष नभएको सर्प र ईख नभएको मानिस काम लाग्दैन
meaning: A snake without poison and a person without envy are useless.

text: विष्टको घरमा भात पाक्दा दमाईको घरमा खलबल
meaning: When a lavish feast of rice begins cooking in the high-caste patron's (विष्ट) house, it triggers a joyful flurry of musical preparation in the traditional tailor/musician's (दमाई) house. (A classic economic dependency; when a major corporate client or industry leader secures massive funding, it naturally creates a flurry of lucrative freelance contracts and jobs down the supply chain).

text: बिसौलीको झिँगा फड्कनु भन्दा धार्नीको टाउको हल्लाउनु बेस
meaning: Instead of watching a tiny, low-weight fly buzz around frantically, it is far more significant when a massive, heavy-weight standard (धार्नी) gently nods its head. (The chaotic, noisy marketing campaigns of a tiny startup mean nothing compared to a single, quiet strategic move or nod from a massive, multi-million dollar market leader).

The great traditional physician is suffering from a massive throat goiter, and the elite astrologer's own daughter tragically ends up a widow. (An ironical situation where an expert or professional is highly capable of solving the entire world's problems, yet remains completely powerless to fix the exact same issues inside their own household).
If you don't see an enemy, look at your brother's face.
If no enemy, raise relatives.
One should not count the death of a refuge-seeker.

text: शिरमा टोपी छैन, खुट्टामा छालाको जुत्ता
meaning: Not owning a basic traditional cap (टोपी) to cover one's bare head, yet wearing expensive, premium leather shoes on one's feet. (A hilarious display of imbalanced finances; someone who can barely afford basic monthly groceries or rent, yet walks around carrying the latest premium flagship smartphone).
Dhaturo does not affect Lord Shiva.

When the star Venus rises during late autumn, the neglected pumpkins left out in the fields begin to rot (कुहाए). (A severe warning against missing the strict seasonal deadline; procrastinating on harvesting assets or deploying a software feature until the market window completely closes and the opportunity goes bad).

text: शोक न सुर्ता, भोक न भकारी
meaning: Having neither a single grief or anxiety (सुर्ता) in the mind, nor a single grain left inside the storage bin (भकारी) to satisfy hunger. (An incredibly carefree, reckless, and deeply irresponsible person who is completely broke and facing ruin, yet doesn't care or take life seriously).

Pairing precious sandalwood with sweet camphor, while matching intoxicating hemp (भाङ) with toxic, poisonous dhaturo. (Like pairs with like; high-quality assets and brilliant developers should be paired with excellent infrastructure, while toxic, chaotic elements naturally clump together).

text: श्रीमती कति बाठी, बोका स्टाइलको केश काटी
meaning: Look how overly modern and 'clever' the wife tries to act, cutting her hair into a ridiculous, rugged punk/he-goat style! (A humorous, sarcastic modern jab at someone blindly following eccentric, bizarre trends and calling it fashion or sophistication).

text: श्रीमतीको पिटाई खाएको लोग्ने चुरा बज्दा तर्सिन्छ
meaning: A husband who has been beaten by his wife gets scared when bangles jingle.
Company is the fruit of virtue.

text: सङ्गै बसी सुती सकी, लाज मान्दै घुम्टो कसी
meaning: After already living and sleeping together for years, she suddenly puts on an act of extreme shyness and tightly draws her bridal veil (घुम्टो). (An absolute hypocrite pretending to be innocent, modest, or deeply strict about rules after they have already broken every single protocol behind closed doors).
Friends together on top of Singhadurbar.

text: सज्जनसंगको मितेरी शिलापत्र, दुर्जनसंगको मितेरी अलपत्र
meaning: Friendship with the noble is like a stone inscription; friendship with the wicked leaves one helpless.

text: सत्यको धन रहन्छ, असत्यको धन रहँदैन
meaning: Wealth earned through truth remains, wealth through falsehood does not.

text: शत्रु पछ्याउने भाइ, तन्नेरी पछ्याउने बुहारी
meaning: A loyal brother who actively hunts down your enemies, and a vibrant daughter-in-law who brings youthful energy and prosperity to the lineage. (Valuable, ideal family dynamics where core members fulfill their exact protective and constructive roles flawlessly).

The humorous local myth that one must smoke a cigarette to withstand the biting winter cold when traveling on a holy pilgrimage to Salinadi, Sankhu. (A playful excuse used by people to justify a bad habit or an unnecessary indulgence during a rigorous, difficult task).

text: सबै लफडा थुतुन र मुतुनले निम्त्याउँछ
meaning: Absolutely every single disaster and legal mess in life is triggered either by a loose tongue (थुतुन/mouth) or unrestrained sexual/sensory desires. (A stark reminder that failing to control your speech and basic impulses guarantees total personal and professional ruin).

text: सबै कुकुर काशी गए गु कसले खाने
meaning: If all dogs go to Kashi, who will eat the feces?

Letting go of every single reliable asset, only to end up holding empty air right under a beast's tail. (Dropping a stable, secure job or core project to chase after reckless, high-risk illusions, leaving you with absolutely nothing in the end).

Thanks entirely to the special hospitality being thrown for the visiting co-father-in-law (सम्धी), I automatically got to enjoy a lavish meal dripping with pure ghee too. (Basking in reflected glory; unexpectedly getting premium perks, bonuses, or high-end treatment just because you happened to accompany a VIP client or investor).

A single wooden stick contributed by a hundred different community members combines to form a massive, overwhelming bundle of support for one needy individual. (The immense power of crowdfunding, open-source collaboration, and community teamwork; a task that crushes one person becomes effortless when distributed among many).
Government work: when will the sun come?

text: सर्प पनि मरोस्, लट्ठी पनि नभाँचियोस्
meaning: May the snake die, but may the stick not break.
A snake sees a snake's feet.

A lazy, spineless man living like an absolute king and exercising supreme authority entirely on his wealthy in-laws' money. (A critique of an incompetent manager or operator who puts on massive airs of success while running a project funded entirely by inherited wealth or effortless handouts).

text: सस्तो बेसारले पनि पखाला लाग्छ र?
meaning: Does using cheap turmeric ever cause diarrhea? Of course not, it just lacks premium flavor. (A counter-perspective to ID 722; implying that a budget-friendly, basic software tool or cheap option still performs its core fundamental job perfectly fine without breaking the system).
The bull's fight, the calf's trampling.
Love for interest is greater than love for the principal.

text: साउनको भेललाई बेलैमा रोक्न नसके बाली नास हुन्छ
meaning: If you fail to dam and control the raging monsoon floods of Shrawan at the very beginning, your entire agricultural crop will be completely destroyed. (Failing to address a critical system bug or financial leak at the early stage guarantees the absolute wipeout of the entire enterprise later).

text: साउनमा आँखा फुटेको गोरूले बाह्रै महिना हरियो देख्छ
meaning: An ox that loses its eyes in Shrawan sees green all twelve months.

You can never successfully render and cook rich animal fat (बोसो) if you possess a stingy, narrow-minded, or timid heart. (To pull off massive business deals, high-yielding investments, or large-scale construction, you must have the courage to spend heavily and take bold risks; small-minded penny-pinching won't work).

text: सानो छउन्जेल मर्ला भन्ने पीर, ठूलो भएपछि मार्ला भन्ने पीर
meaning: When small, the worry is 'will I die?' When grown, the worry is 'will he kill me?'

A tiny mirror is an absolute luxury for a poor child, while uninterrupted comfort (चैन) belongs to the wealthy. (The stark economic divide where minor things bring deep satisfaction to ordinary people, while elites demand systemic, high-end comfort).

The bitter curses of a tiny, harmless water bird (साती) will never cause the death of a massive wild bull or large steer (डिङ्गो). (The noisy complaints, jealous trolling, or online hate from completely powerless critics cannot cause a single bit of harm to a powerful, established market leader).
In hope of the sister-in-law, the brother-in-law's exile.

text: सासूको माया छोरी छउन्जेल, बुहारीको माया छोरा छउन्जेल
meaning: Mother-in-law's love lasts as long as the daughter is there; daughter-in-law's love lasts as long as the son is there.
No work for the soldier, but honor for the general.

Discovering a hyper-allergenic, intensely itchy velvet bean pod (काउसो) hiding right inside a pleasant patch of common garden beans (सिमी). (A dangerous, toxic liability or a highly malicious employee hiding inside an otherwise peaceful, productive team).

text: सियो बनेर पस्ने, फाली बनेर निस्कने
meaning: Enter as a needle, exit as a blade.
Like a tailor who lost his needle.

If alcohol were to be handed out absolutely free of charge (सित्तैमा), the local tavern (भट्टी) would be drunk completely dry within minutes. (When a software feature, service, or asset is offered for free, the public will aggressively exploit and drain the resources instantly, showing zero restraint).

text: सुख पाए ससुराली जानु, दुःख पाए मीतकहाँ जानु
meaning: In happiness, go to the in-laws; in sorrow, go to a friend.

text: सुगुरलाई स्वर्ग जान्छस् भन्दा त्यहाँ गु खान पाइन्छ भनी उल्टो सोध्छ
meaning: Tell a pig 'go to heaven', it asks back 'can I eat feces there?'

text: सुघरी स्वास्नीको पोइ मोटाउँछ, फोहोरी स्वास्नीको कुकुर मोटाउँछ
meaning: A clean wife's husband grows fat; a dirty wife's dog grows fat.
Gold does not need to be coated.

text: सुनारको सय चोट, लोहारको एक चोट
meaning: A goldsmith's hundred blows, a blacksmith's one blow.

The moment the sun sets, the local alcohol enthusiasts and nightlife lovers wake up and get blissfully drunk (मस्त). (A humorous slang reference to the evening party culture starting up the exact second official working hours end).
A lamp in front of the sun.
A traditional programmatic expression or rhythm used in Sorathi folk dance cues where calculations align perfectly. (A task, formula, or code block aligning exactly with expectations).

text: सौताको रिसले श्रीमानको काखमा पिसाब फेर्नु
meaning: Out of anger at the co-wife, urinate in the husband's lap.
When the jackal cries, the chicken disappears.

text: स्यालको शिकार गर्न जाँदा बाघको तयारी गर्नुपर्छ
meaning: When going to hunt a jackal, you must prepare for a tiger.

text: स्वास्थ राम्रो चेकअपले, केटी राम्रो मेकअपले
meaning: Health is good with a checkup, a girl is good with makeup.

text: स्वास्नीको अगाडि सिँह जोडिए पनि बिरालो
meaning: Even if you prefix the word 'Lion' (सिंह) to a husband's name, he still shrinks down to a quiet, submissive house cat right in front of his wife. (The classic, humorous cultural trope of a fierce, powerful public leader being completely meek and obedient at home under domestic authority).

text: स्वास्नीमान्छेको थर छैन, लोग्ने मान्छेको घर छैन
meaning: A woman has no surname, a man has no home.

Singing songs exclusively about a small weeding knife (खुर्पी) at the formal wedding ceremony of a large sickle (हँसिया). (Talking about completely irrelevant, off-topic side issues during a highly critical corporate board meeting or project presentation).

The loud, dramatic sound of flatulence (पादाइ) is far greater than the actual substance passed. (A massive over-exaggeration; a tiny startup making a massive, deafening marketing noise over an incredibly minor, basic product upgrade).

Running off in a frantic hurry to relieve oneself, but completely forgetting to bring along the essential water container (ढुङ्ग्रो) for cleaning up. (Sprinting ahead to launch a software product or close a client deal without preparing the core backend infrastructure or essential paperwork).

An extreme, aggressive ultimatum: 'Go ahead and defecate if you must, but the second you try to urinate, I will cut you down!' (An incredibly rigid, hyper-controlling authority or boss imposing absurdly strict limitations and impossible conditions on a team).

Only noticing the bathroom door or realizing the solution after you have already soiled yourself. (An absolute lack of foresight; coming up with a brilliant security plan or backup strategy only after the database has already been hacked and ruined).
More shame for the watcher than for the defecator.

Frantically searching for a clean toilet spot or wiping material at the absolute last emergency second when nature is already violently calling. (Procrastinating on vital preparations and running around in a panic only when the strict deadline is actively crashing down on your head).
Hasty work ends up being messed up.
Mustard does not grow on the palm of the hand.

Generously donating a cow that went missing in the jungle days ago as a 'sacred offering' to the Sun God. (Making a grand, pretentious show of charity by gifting an asset, corrupted code library, or broken equipment that was already completely lost, useless, or write-off property anyway).

When encountering a pathologically clever, cunning rogue (हरिप), even Almighty Fate steps back in caution. (An incredibly slick, hyper-smart operator or negotiator who manages to manipulate every loophole and outsmart every system block).

When encountering a pathologically clever, cunning rogue (हरिप), even Almighty Fate steps back in caution. (An incredibly slick, hyper-smart operator or negotiator who manages to manipulate every loophole and outsmart every system block).

Handing an expensive, rare nutmeg (जाइफल) to a reckless person who is guaranteed to drop and lose it in the grass within minutes. (Entrusting a premium, high-value account or sensitive server access to an incredibly sloppy, irresponsible junior developer).

A completely incompetent person who can't even hold onto an object bragging loudly about owning a rare nutmeg. (An empty talker who lacks basic execution skills boasting about their high-level strategies or prestigious certificates).
Sand in the halwa.

text: हलेदो भन्ने थाहा पाएपछि कोट्याउनु पर्दैन
meaning: Once you know it's turmeric, you don't need to scratch.

Deliberately causing the plow to get stuck deep in a rock (हलो अड्काएर), and then mercilessly beating the innocent oxen for not moving forward. (An abusive, toxic manager who sets up an impossible system bottleneck or fails to provide the required budget, then severely penalizes the junior developers for missing the deployment target).

Chopping up a perfectly functional, highly valuable wooden farm plow just to carve a crude, low-value mallet (मुङ्ग्रो) out of it. (An act of supreme corporate stupidity; destroying a massive, profitable core system or permanent asset just to fulfill a tiny, short-term temporary requirement).
An ox does not give birth just by plowing.
A loose tooth will fall out one day.

text: हाँसी हाँसी कसेको गाँठो रोई रोई फुकाउनुपर्छ
meaning: A knot tied laughing must be untied crying.
A book in hand, ten things in mind.

text: हातीको दुइटा दात हुन्छ, एउटा खाने अर्को देखाउने
meaning: An elephant has two tusks: one for eating, one for showing off.
An elephant came, an elephant came... phussa (nothing).

text: हात्ती उडाउने बतास आयो, पिउरी खोज्छेस् राँड
meaning: A terrifying, cataclysmic hurricane capable of sweeping massive elephants up into the sky has arrived, yet this foolish person is obsessing over finding a microscopic cotton wick (पिउरी) for a lamp! (A severe critique of someone losing their mind over petty, micro-penny details while the entire company is facing a massive, existential macro-level financial meltdown).

text: हाती चढिसकेको मान्छेले गधा चढ्न के रुचाउला
meaning: One who has ridden an elephant, why would he like to ride a donkey?

The entire massive body of the giant elephant successfully squeezed through the narrow gate, but its tiny tail got completely stuck at the very end. (Completing 99% of an incredibly massive, complex enterprise project perfectly, only to get completely blocked at the final inches by a tiny, trivial administrative detail or a missing signature).
Elephant walks, horse shines.
A cumin seed in an elephant's mouth.

text: हातको माछा छोडेर पोखरीको माछा खोज्ने
meaning: Leave the fish in hand and search for the fish in the pond.
A defeated dog always shows its teeth.

A notoriously violent, charging bull (हान्ने गोरु) doesn't wait for a strategic opportunity; it lunges and attacks randomly at every single turn. (A highly aggressive, toxic competitor or volatile person who acts purely on destructive impulse, attacking everyone around them without any logic).
Without the wind blowing, the leaf does not shake.
Is walking, is wiping the footsteps.
The walking ox gets beaten.
A worm does not know the value of a diamond.

An old woman who has been completely embarrassed or left empty-handed awkwardly grinning (खिस दाँत) to hide her deep shame. (The forced, sheepish smile a contractor or developer gives when their grand bluff is thoroughly exposed by raw technical data).
A plant that will grow has shiny leaves.

When an absolute catastrophe or destined downfall (हार) is set in motion, even the gods themselves cannot intervene to divert it. (When a fundamentally flawed, unvetted project architecture is deployed, a total crash is mathematically guaranteed; no amount of wishing will save it).

text: हुलमुलमा जिउ जोगाउनु, अनिकालमा बिउ जोगाउनु
meaning: Save your body in the crowd, save your seed in famine.

text: हेरेर मर्नु भन्दा छेरेर मर्नु जाती
meaning: Instead of sitting back meekly, freezing up, and watching your own destruction unfold, it is better to go down fighting fiercely, emptying out every last resource you have. (When a startup or project is failing, don't just paralyze yourself with fear; take aggressive, messy, desperate action and go out swinging).

Looking from afar it appeared to be a harmless, gentle bird, but the moment it landed, it struck like a heavy, devastating iron axe (बन्चरो). (An investment or a client that looked completely simple and easy on paper, but turned out to be an absolute nightmare of liabilities once the contract was signed).

Looking exceptionally beautiful and golden to the eyes, but turns out to be incredibly tough, stale, and painful to chew when you bite into the corn. (A beautifully designed, gorgeous user interface that looks premium, but has a backend code so horribly written that the application is completely slow and unusable).

You can never place your trust or bank your finances on casual, passing glances or erratic, uncontrolled bursts of action. (A business reminder to ignore superficial looks, erratic hype trends, and verbal promises; rely strictly on stable metrics and data).

text: हैन भने बाटो पनि छैन, छ भने बाटो पनि छ
meaning: If not, there is no path; if there is, there is a path.

text: होचो आउँदा घोचो, अग्लो आउँदा अग्लो
meaning: When the short comes, a spike; when the tall comes, tall.

Keeping oneself fiercely alert, cautious, and calculating while completely ignoring, neglecting, or remaining indifferent to the chaotic, reckless state of others. (A hyper-individualistic approach where an operator ensures their own legal and financial assets are 100% secure and backed up, while letting their careless partners or competitors ride straight into a disaster because it's not their problem).
A rumor does not walk without noise.

text: ह्याङ आउँदा खाना छ, ह्याङ जाँदा खाना छैन
meaning: When the honored family priest (ह्याङ) visits, a lavish, delicious feast is automatically prepared; the moment the priest departs, the household returns to ordinary, sparse meals. (A commentary on conditional hospitality and temporary prosperity; enjoying premium perks, high budgets, or excellent treatment only while a VIP client, investor, or external auditor is physically present around the office).
